commit_scope: Repair the fourth-arm universal table loader so large fks tables keep their string pool intact, closing the form-mut 31/31/31/29 residual and raising the measured fourth-arm floor.

commands: COORD_AGENT=codex@a3ec ./scripts/agent-coord.sh claim "form-mut fourth-arm residual after PR #2975: diagnose 31/31/31/29 divergence without touching cf56 JIT-lower lane"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-mut-band.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: Focused form-mut validation now returns 31 with 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and 1 ok / 0 divergent. The manifest gate prints PASS-4WAY form-mut. Full validation is still diagnostic rc=1 because four unrelated residual bands remain, but the measured floor is now fourth arm: 105 band(s) four-way, 540 ok, 4 divergent. Root cause: the form-mut fks table is 283601 bytes, beyond the old 262143-byte fkwu table loader read; rows pointed at the correct high string-pool indexes, but the runtime loaded a truncated pool and direct string lengths read as zero. The universal table buffer/read limit now covers the large fks image.

ci_validation.notes: Pending PR creation and GitHub checks.

commands: No public HTTP behavior change is expected; this is a Form fourth-arm runtime proof update.
deploy_validation.notes: The fix changes generated fkwu runtime source emitted by Form recipes. It affects local/kernel validation, not public API routing.

phase_gate.reason: Local focused and full diagnostic evidence is complete; CI, merge, and deploy validation are pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The emitted fkwu universal walker can load large fks table images without truncating the string section. form-mut now agrees across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu at verdict 31, and the full Form suite floor moves from 104 four-way / 539 ok / 5 divergent to 105 four-way / 540 ok / 4 divergent.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form fourth-arm universal walker source; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Focused form-mut validation proves the formerly divergent band four-way.
Full validate records the raised fourth-arm floor and the four remaining unrelated divergent bands.
known_full_suite_gaps: go-jit-band.fk: TypeScript source parse error unexpected token rparen at 5344
